title: theme property cascade
manager: Make visual properties cascade — color and other attributes auto-descend through the containment/group hierarchy, can be set at assign-level, and have well-defined default-variance rules — with a dense notation for writing them compactly. Cascade is what lets you theme a whole subtree by styling its parent; without it every state must be styled individually, which no one will do.
cs: folds fsl#346 (assign-level properties), #1218 (property-default variance rules), #1174 (dense property notation, underway)
